simple_types.name: Precision_Type
simple_types.code: type Precision_Type is (YEAR, MONTH, DAY, HOUR, MINUTE, SECOND, SUBSECOND);

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Date : in Ada.Calendar.Time) return String

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code:
function Image (Date      : in Ada.Calendar.Time;
                Precision : in Precision_Type) return String

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Date : in Date_Record) return String

subprograms.name: Image
subprograms.code:
function Image (Date      : in Date_Record;
                Precision : in Precision_Type) return String

subprograms.name: Value
subprograms.code: function Value (Date : in String) return Ada.Calendar.Time
